stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the function of the device shown in the image above?

options.a: It is a mass balance weight, fitted to prevent aileron flutter.
options.b: It is a trailing edge flap, fitted to increase aileron effectiveness.
options.c: It is a trim tab, used to reduce pilot control forces by aerodynamically assisting the aileron.
options.d: It is a balance tab, to shift the aileron's CG closer to the hinge line.
